papers.title: Clinicopathological profile of invasive ductal carcinoma with full IHC panel at Prashanti Cancer Care Pune
papers.institution: Prashanti Cancer Care / Ruby Hall Clinic Pune
papers.access_route: Collaborative research agreement with Prashanti Cancer Care Institute, Pune, India; contact corresponding author for MTA
papers.notes: n=434 IDC FFPE; full IHC panel (ER, PR, HER2, Ki67) documented on all cases; FISH for HER2 equivocal cases; grade and stage annotated; Indian population; treatment history (NAC) documented

papers.title: Women's Health Initiative Observational Study: ER+/PR+ breast cancer plasma biobank with HER2 adjudication
papers.institution: Women's Health Initiative (WHI-OS) / Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center
papers.access_route: WHI data and specimens via NHLBI BioLINCC (biolincc.nhlbi.nih.gov); application with IRB required
papers.notes: n=121 ER+/PR+ IDC with matched plasma at two time points; HER2 centrally adjudicated; Ki67 index available; FFPE + plasma matched per case; postmenopausal US women; part of larger WHI biospecimen collection via BioLINCC

expected_retrievable_institutions: Prashanti Cancer Care / Ruby Hall Clinic Pune
Women's Health Initiative / Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center (BioLINCC)
notes: Prashanti (n=434) is the largest FFPE-only collection with a complete 4-marker IHC panel. WHI (n=121) is smaller but provides matched plasma + FFPE with HER2 adjudication and BioLINCC access. These are complementary: tissue depth from Prashanti, plasma pairing from WHI.
